_comment: FCUK-EM-ALL runtime contract. Copy this file to config.json (which is gitignored) and fill in your values before running bootstrap.sh. Replace every YOUR_* placeholder. config.json is never committed, so a real NordVPN token / DNS API key here stays local — but you may instead leave those blank and place them in secrets/ (see secrets/README.md).
_tls_mode_help: 'local' = self-signed certs + hosts-file entries for *.<domain> -> 127.0.0.1 (no public DNS needed). 'domain' = real ACME certs; requires a domain you control plus dns_provider + dns_api_key below.
_modules_help: 'core' (always required) = Jellyfin, Navidrome, Kavita, Audiobookshelf, Immich, Authelia, Caddy, wizard. Add 'arr' for the request/download stack (Radarr, Sonarr, Jellyseerr, Prowlarr, qBittorrent, FlareSolverr). Add 'vpn' (requires 'arr') to route the download stack through NordVPN. Example: ["core","arr","vpn"].

preflight._comment: Minimum host resources checked before install. Immich is RAM-hungry; its DB must sit on a real filesystem.
